title: KuroLIB
description: a library mod for effects and other stuff in SCP: Overtime and The Box of Horrors
body: This is a lightweight library mod designed to add custom effects and functionalities for use in the Box of Horrors and SCP: Overtime mods. It doesn't add new gameplay content by itself, but it provides essential backend support and shared systems that both mods rely on. This includes various visual effects, sound triggers, and internal mechanics that help bring entities, items, and environmental features to life in BOH and SCPO. If you're playing with either of these mods, this library is required for certain features to work properly.
